A Message For You
YOUR GUESTS
WILL REMEMBER
THIS MEAL.
Hi there,

We're KNUCK. — a Lehi-based catering company built around one thing: serious food, cooked with real fire.

We specialize in slow-roasted Pork Knuckle — bone-in, crispy skin, fall-off-the-bone tender — and fine cuts that command attention at any table. No reheated trays. No boring buffets. A feast your guests will talk about long after the event ends.
Book Your Feast →   (801) 882-3386
